identity.vibe: Clean modern design, soft gradients, professional app-like RTL experience, smooth and friendly

rules: NO INTER FONT. Must add Tajawal and Cairo from Google Fonts to index.html.
Arabic typography requires slightly looser line-height: use leading-relaxed for body text.

global.rtl_rule: CRITICAL: The entire app must be RTL. Set <html dir='rtl' lang='ar'> in index.html.
global.logical_props: Use Tailwind logical properties: ms-, me-, ps-, pe-, start-, end- instead of ml-, mr-, pl-, pr-, left-, right-.
global.container: Wrap the app routes in a `<div className='max-w-md mx-auto bg-[#F8FAFC] min-h-screen relative shadow-2xl overflow-x-hidden'>` container to simulate a phone screen on desktop viewports.

header.layout: Flex justify-between items-center px-4 py-4 bg-[#F8FAFC] sticky top-0 z-40
header.elements: App Name centered, Notification bell icon on start, Profile avatar on end.

search_bar.style: bg-white rounded-full shadow-sm px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3

categories_grid.icon_container: w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl bg-indigo-50 text-[#4F46E5] flex items-center justify-center text-xl shadow-sm

ads_list.card: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative
ads_list.title: text-base font-bold text-[#1E293B] line-clamp-2
ads_list.price: text-lg font-extrabold bg-gradient-to-r from-[#4F46E5] to-[#06B6D4] bg-clip-text text-transparent mt-2
ads_list.location: text-xs text-slate-500 flex items-center gap-1 mt-2
ads_list.favorite_btn: absolute top-3 end-3 w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-red-500 shadow-sm

bottom_navigation.layout: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-white h-16 rounded-t-3xl flex justify-between items-center px-6 z-50
bottom_navigation.fab: absolute -top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#4F46E5] to-[#06B6D4] text-white flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-[0_8px_20px_rgba(79,70,229,0.3)] hover:scale-105 transition-transform

auth_pages.layout: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen px-6 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#F8FAFC] to-indigo-50/50 pb-20
auth_pages.inputs: w-full bg-slate-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 border border-slate-100 mb-4 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#818CF8]
auth_pages.button: w-full rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-[#4F46E5] to-[#06B6D4] text-white font-bold py-3 shadow-md

add_listing_form.image_upload: w-full aspect-video rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-400 gap-2 mb-6

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Wrap main routes in framer-motion <motion.div> with initial={opacity:0, y:15} animate={opacity:1, y:0} transition={duration:0.3}
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Hover scale on category icons and FAB. Heart icon pulsing on click.

instructions_to_main_agent: HTML ATTRIBUTES: Update index.html to include <html dir='rtl' lang='ar'>.

FONTS: Include Tajawal and Cairo Google Fonts in index.html (e.g. <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cairo:wght@400;600;700&family=Tajawal:wght@400;500;700&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>). Configure tailwind.config.js to map 'sans' to Cairo and 'heading' to Tajawal.

LAYOUT CONSTRAINT: Since it's a mobile web app experience, all routes must be wrapped in a main layout container with classes: `max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative bg-[#F8FAFC] shadow-2xl overflow-x-hidden`. This centers the 'app' on desktop screens.
ROUTING: Set up a bottom tab navigation layout where the BottomNav component is fixed to the bottom of the max-w-md wrapper.
FAB POSITIONING: Ensure the Add Listing FAB is perfectly centered in the bottom nav and visually breaks out (floating).
MOCK DATA: Build a robust array of mock ads using the provided image URLs and realistic Arabic titles (e.g., 'شقة فاخرة للبيع', 'سيارة رياضية 2023').
DATA ATTRIBUTES: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
